body_preview:
Dear Benjamin,

Thank you for letting me know about the portal issue.

Please be informed that the payment for invoice INV-144189 ($41.24)
Date: 03/29/2026
06:24PM EDT  has been declined due to insufficient funds. Could you please
try again?

Regarding the issue portal, could you please specify which one isn't
working for you?

I look forward to hearing from you soon!

Best regards,
Kamil Jedrzejczyk

On Tue, 31 Mar 2026 at 15:15, benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com> wrote:

> You have two types of payment portals, one of which works and one of which
> doesn’t work even trying to process payments, specially the past due
> payment portal On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 2: 10 AM Kamil Jedrzejczyk <AR@
> coreweave. com> wrote:
> 
> You have two types of payment portals, one of which works and one of which
> doesn’t work even trying to process payments, specially the past due
> payment portal
>
> On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 2:10 AM Kamil Jedrzejczyk <AR@coreweave.com>
> wrote:
>
>> Dear JusticeDAO,
>>
>> I hope this email finds you well.
>>
>> We are writing to follow up on the outstanding invoice that has yet to be
>> settled despite previous reminders.
>>

>>

subject: Re: 2nd Attempt RE: CoreWeave Past Due - JusticeDAO
